name: Pt Panca Mitra Multiperdana Tbk
summary: Pt Panca Mitra Multiperdana Tbk engages in processing and sale of shrimp. The company supplies shrimp under EBINOYA brand name to restaurants, hotels, and food service firms in Indonesia; and exports to the United States and Japan under Leader brand name. Pt Panca Mitra Multiperdana Tbk was founded in 2004 and is headquartered in Jawa Timur, Indonesia.
